title: BDRY - August 1, 2023
summary: The Atlantic Capesize market awakens, while weather in the Pacific could soon become a positive catalyst - In July Poliburo meeting provides little clues on new stimulus - The much-anticipated July Poliburo meeting did not Dry bulk focus shifts back to fundamentals - Following a period of high uncertainty and significant disruptions
